content.fact_text: Implementation of production-grade PostgreSQL and Redis infrastructure modules with resilience and observability.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes PostgreSQL client via Prisma and Redis client via ioredis with TLS, circuit breaker protection (Opossum), and structured logging (Pino). Implements transactional wrappers and health checks.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized, resilient, and production-ready interface for PostgreSQL and Redis interactions, ensuring ACID compliance and observability.
